name: Cole Slaw (Lc)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium to large bowl, combine the Dijon mustard and mayonnaise.
2. Add the sugar substitute, lemon juice, and salt to the mixture. Stir until well combined.
3. Add the shredded cabbage to the bowl and toss everything together until evenly mixed.
(Chilling salad prior to serving allows flavors to blend and enhances slaw for best flavor.)
